description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% Lycra, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a spread collar, buttoned placket and a curved hem FitRegularWash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryTake formal dressing to the next level with this shirt from arrow woman. This colour suits all occasions, and the cotton fabric is sure to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with formal pants and leather slip-on shoes for a formal look, or roll up the sleeves and wear it with jeans and ballet flats for a semi-formal vibe.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
